seoTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Royal and Mount Saint Thomas. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Royal and Mount Saint Thomas.
heading: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Royal, New South Wales and Mount Saint Thomas, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Royal has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Mount Saint Thomas (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Royal or Mount Saint Thomas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Royal has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Mount Saint Thomas scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Royal scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Saint Thomas scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Royal or Mount Saint Thomas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Royal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
